notes: QA session #2 by Ian + Claude. Fortune 500 fleet management. Optimizely CMS on Azure App Service behind Cloudflare. 10 code fixes, 17 DB fixes. MIQ 56→59.

press_page_url_no_double.note: URL must not contain doubled /en-us/en-us/ path

found_pages.note: Should find at least 1 press page

rss_feed.note: Ryder has an RSS feed at /en-us/api/rssfeed/showrssfeed

article_count.note: HTML shows ~8 initial items; RSS is content marketing feed, not press. Real press on external newsroom.ryder.com.

expectedCheckpoints.note: Ryder has active newsroom with recent content (2026-03-24)

negativeAssertions.note: URL must not have doubled locale prefix from baseUrl + sitemapPath concatenation

fixedBugs.description: press_page_url had doubled /en-us/en-us/ path — baseUrl already contained /en-us and sitemapPages path also started with /en-us/newsroom
article_count was 0 due to custom CSS classes — generic selectors (article, .post, .entry) did not match Ryder's press release markup
fixedBugs.assertion: Press article counting should be robust to custom markup

expectedCheckpoints.note: gzip, not brotli — captured headers show gzip

negativeAssertions.note: CMS must be detected — Optimizely fingerprint was added

fixedBugs.description: CMS was null — Optimizely/Episerver was not in fingerprints.json. Added fingerprint with HTML meta, header, and cookie rules.
Cookie-based fingerprint matching (CookieRule interface) existed in fingerprints.json but M02 had no matching logic wired up
fixedBugs.assertion: Cookie fingerprints should be matched against Set-Cookie headers

htmlLang.note: HTML lang attribute should be present

expectedCheckpoints.note: Title exists but may be outside 30-60 char sweet spot

careers_page_url.note: Should prefer the main careers hub, not a sub-page like freight-agent

expectedCheckpoints.note: iCIMS is not in the professional-tier list

fixedBugs.description: Sitemap only provided niche sub-pages, missed main /en-us/careers hub. No fallback HTTP probing exists in M17 unlike M16/M19.
fixedBugs.assertion: M17 should have fallback probing for careers pages like M16 and M19 do

fixedBugs.description: Best careers page selection used first-found, which was a sub-page (freight-agent) instead of the root careers hub (/en-us/careers).
fixedBugs.assertion: careers_page_url should prefer the shortest/root careers path

external_ir_domain.note: Should detect external IR subdomain from main page links

ticker_symbol.note: NYSE: R — detected from main page HTML

expectedCheckpoints.note: IR portal is on external subdomain (investors.ryder.com) which offline replay can't fetch — info is correct for replay
No SEC filings detectable from main page alone
No ESG report on main page
No IR comms on main page

negativeAssertions.note: NSE was extracted from 'SolutionsEngineered' body text — must be NYSE

fixedBugs.description: Stock exchange was 'NSE' extracted from 'SolutionsEngineered' body text via substring match. The ticker regex must extract exchange from the same match as the ticker symbol.
fixedBugs.assertion: stock_exchange must be NYSE, not NSE

expectedCheckpoints.note: Basic FAQ/help content only from captured sitemap page
Only 1 channel detected from captured page

fixedBugs.description: Contact form UUID pattern not matched — custom form ID format was not recognized by the form detection logic
fixedBugs.assertion: Form detection should handle various ID/name patterns

fixedBugs.description: Social media detection only found Twitter — missed LinkedIn and other platforms in footer links
fixedBugs.assertion: Social detection should check multiple platforms beyond Twitter
